section2.headline: Welcome to finding your Vacation Home, the Right Way.
section2.introText:
Stop overpaying on Airbnb.
Stop scrolling through sketchy listings.

And stop wasting time on agents who ghost you, owners who cancel
last minute, or homes that look nothing like the photos.

text1.title: THE LUXURY FIRE ISLAND HOMES DIFFERENCE:
text1.description:
At Luxury Fire Island Homes, we take the stress off
your plate and match you with a vacation rental that
actually delivers—from the spotless kitchen to the
smooth check-in to the sunset view you’ll be bragging
about for months.

text2.title: Fun for the whole family
text2.description:
Whether you’re planning a peaceful couples’ weekend
or a multi-family getaway (in-laws optional 😅), we’ll
find you the perfect place—fast and for at least $1K
less than what you’d pay on Airbnb or Vrbo.

And yes, we have plenty of pet-friendly homes for
rent. Because let’s be honest… you’re really coming so
your favorite family member can hit the beach.

benefits: Curated Homes That Aren’t on Airbnb or Vrbo
section4.headline: Here’s What You Can Expect

section5.headline: The Truth?
section5.bottomline: We’ve helped hundreds of NYC and Long Island families find their dream Fire Island vacation home—and we’d love to help you too.
section5.description:
Our Clients Come for the Homes... But Stay for the Service.
You don’t just want “a rental”—you want someone who listens, follows through, and treats
your vacation like it actually matters. That’s us.

heroSection.eyebrow: Your Dream Vacation  on Fire Island Starts Here
heroSection.headline: Without the stress, guesswork, or the broken A/C
